zh: 「小孩吃個飯,總是拖拖拉拉等我餵他、
en: "My child is always so slow eating — I end up having to feed him,

zh: 要不然可耗掉個把鐘頭」
en: otherwise it drags on for an hour or more."

zh: 先指導簡單的技巧且引發其好奇心、
en: First, teach a simple technique and spark their curiosity.

zh: 例如吃飯先和孩子玩飯飯坐在湯匙飛進嘴巴裏的遊戲、
en: For example, play the "spoon airplane flying into the mouth" game,

zh: 再示範拿湯匙的方法並鼓勵小孩子自己嘗試、
en: then demonstrate how to hold the spoon and encourage them to try themselves.
Whether they do it right or not,
as long as they try, praise them warmly.
Teach the proper grip gradually over time.

zh: 切莫因沒有時間或耐性便餵他了事。
en: Never just feed them because you lack time or patience.
